economic_notes: Operates Tim Hortons franchise and Esso business operations. Has investments in Shwe Miikaan Corp (33.333% ownership) and Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership via equity method. Two inactive subsidiaries: Magnetawan Development GP Inc. and Magnetawan Development Limited Partnership.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to unfinalized financial statements of Shwe Miikaan Corp and Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership (equity method investments) for fiscal year ended March 31, 2023. Investment in SMC carried at $1 with accumulated losses of $51,072 offset by unfunded deficit. Minor's Trust of $146,104 held on behalf of members. Restricted cash of $188,628 includes $174,000 pledged as security for Bank of Montreal loan guarantee. expenses_enterprises includes both Tim Hortons ($1,101,648) and Esso ($10,062,790) operations.
